analysis: The project is a test website with a focus on black holes. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the website. The CSS file needs to be updated to include a black hole theme with animations and interactive elements. The JavaScript file needs to be fixed for syntax errors and to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality. The HTML file needs to be completed to include all sections related to black holes and a mobile-friendly navigation menu.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a black hole theme with animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the SVG data URLs are properly formatted and include Egyptian-themed patterns.

Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in the HTML file.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
